label: audit-driven refinement closeout
topWin: Shipped the audit's top refinements: identity-safe canon cleanup, shared-world trust helpers, first-session route guidance, and Sun Director 2.0 foundation.
topGap: Supabase production policies still need to mirror the client trust layer before scaled public traffic.
ignisNote: The project moved from strong prototype toward safer public readiness. The next leverage point is server-side trust enforcement plus modular extraction from App.jsx.
